ai_summary: Banka BioLoo Limited has filed a routine compliance update with the NSE, confirming the non-applicability of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This is because all company shares are held in dematerialized form, and no dematerialization or rematerialization requests were received during the reported quarter. This filing represents standard regulatory adherence, indicating sound share registry management with no material impacts or red flags identified.
